sourcesUsed.label: Current team examples and strategy notes
sourcesUsed.notes: Local seeded example derived from uploaded team fixture text.

keyLegalityNotes: Mega Evolution is officially confirmed for the first Ranked ruleset.
Unsupported or speculative Mega forms must be treated as illegal until verified.
keyMetaNotes: Doubles has the strongest current tournament signal.
Builder and audit output must preserve fun identity while replacing unsupported content.
unresolvedUncertainties: The current public official pages do not fully expose a complete live legality table.
Exact live regulation label remains secondary or unconfirmed unless surfaced by official pages.

teamAudits.originalConceptSummary: A stable Singles pivot offense shell that preserves weird Hisuian Zoroark pressure without overloading on Ghosts.
legalityAudit: Core species appear plausible for Champions-style roster use but exact live legality remains unconfirmed in this seeded example.
No speculative custom Mega is present in the original concept.

structuralDiagnosis.roleCompression: Good overall. Palafin, Bellibolt, and Garganacl naturally cover pivoting, glue, and long-game progress.
structuralDiagnosis.speedControl: Mostly limited to raw Speed tiers and Jet Punch; no dedicated teamwide speed control.
structuralDiagnosis.defensiveBackbone: Bellibolt plus Garganacl forms the real backbone.
structuralDiagnosis.pivoting: Strong. Flip Turn, Volt Switch, and U-turn keep tempo flowing.
structuralDiagnosis.winConditions: Palafin cleanup or Dragonite endgame after chip.
redundancyOrAntiSynergy: Can become too reactive if Zoroark is spent early.

changes: Keep the pivot shell but tighten the cleaner plan
why: The original engine is already coherent.
The goal is to preserve identity while removing dead overlap.

refinedTeam.name: Balanced Pivot Offense
whyChosen: Keeps the original stable shell intact.
Preserves weird pressure without turning the team into generic sludge.

teamAudits.whyBetter: The refined version keeps the team’s identity but makes the cleaner routes and pivot shell more explicit.

playAround: Do not reveal Zoroark too early

biggestImprovements: Preserved weird identity without overloading Ghost overlap
biggestRemainingRisks: Electric pressure can still stress the shell

justifications: Balanced Pivot Offense is the safest seeded example.
Mega Scovillain Room Balance is the clearest tournament-shaped Doubles shell if the Mega is verified legal.
Snow Pivot Brawl is the strangest but most stylish option.

whatChangedFromOriginal: Illegal or speculative content must be flagged and replaced.
Role clarity and matchup plans were made explicit.
howToRerunNextMonth: Check the latest official Champions pages first.
Refresh the snapshot before rebuilding or re-auditing teams.
